title: Login Issue
description: User unable to login even after entering correct email and password. The system shows an authentication error and prevents access to the dashboard.

title: Payment Failed
description: Customer reports that payment fails during checkout. Transaction loads for a long time and then returns an unsuccessful payment message.

title: Password Reset Problem
description: User requested a password reset but the reset email has not been received. Customer checked spam folder but still cannot find the email.

title: Profile Update Error
description: Customer unable to update profile details such as phone number and address. After saving changes, the system reloads but information remains unchanged.

title: Dashboard Not Loading
description: After login, the dashboard page keeps loading and never fully appears. User sees a loading spinner but no data or interface elements are displayed.

title: Email Notification Missing
description: User is not receiving important system email notifications such as ticket updates and account alerts even though notifications are enabled.

title: File Upload Error
description: Customer tries to upload files through the support form but the upload fails repeatedly. The system displays an unknown error message.

title: Slow Page Response
description: Several pages inside the application take unusually long to load. Users report delays when navigating between dashboard sections.

title: Account Suspension
description: Customer account appears to be suspended automatically without warning. User cannot access services and requests clarification and restoration.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: The search bar does not return results when users search for existing items or tickets. It always shows an empty result page.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer noticed that the billing amount charged on the invoice is higher than expected. The payment summary does not match the selected plan.

title: App Crash on Mobile
description: Application crashes when the user tries to open it on certain Android devices. The app closes immediately after the splash screen.

title: Notification Delay
description: Push notifications for updates and messages are arriving much later than expected. Some alerts appear hours after the event occurred.

title: Language Settings Bug
description: Users report that language preferences reset automatically after refreshing the page. Selected language does not stay saved in settings.

title: Two Factor Auth Issue
description: Customer cannot complete login because the two-factor authentication code does not work even when entered immediately after receiving it.
